title: IntelOwl Helm Chart Values
description: JSON Schema for validating IntelOwl Helm chart values

baseUrl.description: Base URL for the application (used for CORS and absolute URLs)

defaultTimeout.description: Default timeout for analyzers in seconds

debug.description: Enable Django debug mode (never enable in production)

existingSecret.description: Use existing secret for Django secret key (key: django-secret)

secretKey.description: Django secret key (required). Generate with: python -c "from django.core.management.utils import get_random_secret_key; print(get_random_secret_key())"

existingSecret.description: Use existing secret for SMTP password (key: email-password)

httpsEnabled.description: Enable HTTPS security headers (set to true when TLS is terminated at ingress/gateway)

logLevel.description: Log level (DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR, CRITICAL)

oldJobsRetentionDays.description: Number of days to retain old jobs (set to 0 to disable)

existingSecret.description: Use existing secret for Slack token (key: slack-token)
Use existing secret for RabbitMQ password (key: rabbitmq-password)
Use existing secret for Redis password (key: redis-password)
Use existing secret for AWS credentials

type.description: Broker type: redis, rabbitmq, or sqs

affinity.description: Affinity rules for Celery Beat pod

extraEnvVars.description: Additional environment variables for Celery Beat

extraVolumeMounts.description: Additional volume mounts for Celery Beat

tag.description: Celery Beat image tag (defaults to app.version)

nodeSelector.description: Node selector for Celery Beat pod

enabled.description: Enable weekly Celery worker restart CronJob

schedule.description: Cron schedule (default: every Sunday at 3:00 AM)

affinity.description: Affinity rules for Celery Worker pods

enabled.description: Enable Horizontal Pod Autoscaler for Celery Worker

concurrency.description: Celery concurrency (number of worker processes per pod)

extraEnvVars.description: Additional environment variables for Celery Worker

extraVolumeMounts.description: Additional volume mounts for Celery Worker

tag.description: Celery Worker image tag (defaults to app.version)

nodeSelector.description: Node selector for Celery Worker pods

enabled.description: Enable Pod Disruption Budget for Celery Worker

terminationGracePeriodSeconds.description: Termination grace period in seconds (allow tasks to complete)

containerSecurityContext.description: Container security context applied to all containers

enabled.description: Enable Pod Disruption Budget for Daphne

existingSecret.description: Use existing secret for database password (key: db-password)

allowMmap.description: Allow mmap (set to true for production performance)

enabled.description: Enable Elasticsearch for analysis results indexing
Install ECK operator via this chart (set to false if ECK operator is already installed)

existingSecret.description: Use existing secret for password (key: flower-password)

password.description: Password for basic auth (auto-generated if empty)

imagePullSecrets.description: Global Docker registry secret names as an array

retentionDays.description: Number of days to retain log files

schedule.description: Cron schedule (default: every day at 2:00 AM)

enabled.description: Enable migration job as pre-install/pre-upgrade hook
Enable multi-queue workers for better resource isolation

terminationGracePeriodSeconds.description: Termination grace period (longer for long tasks)

allowExternalEgress.description: Allow external egress (required for analyzers that need internet access)

create.description: Create GatewayClass (usually created by the provider)

gatewayProvider.description: Gateway API provider: nginx-gateway-fabric, envoy-gateway, istio, kong, traefik

enabled.description: Enable Pod Disruption Budget for Nginx

podSecurityContext.description: Pod security context applied to all pods

instances.description: Number of PostgreSQL instances (1 for dev, 3 for HA)

enabled.description: Install CloudNative-PG operator via this chart (set to true only if not already installed)

existingSecretPasswordKey.description: Key in existingSecret containing the password (CloudPirates chart uses "password")
Key in existingSecret containing the password

enabled.description: Enable Sentinel for HA (requires architecture: replication)

accessModes.description: Access modes for generic logs PVC

storageClass.description: Storage class for generic logs (uses global.storageClass if empty)

localStorage.description: Use local storage (PVCs). Set to false for cloud storage (S3)

endpoint.description: S3 endpoint URL (for S3-compatible storage like MinIO)

existingSecret.description: Use existing secret for S3 credentials

accessModes.description: Access modes for shared files PVC

storageClass.description: Storage class for shared files (uses global.storageClass if empty)

accessModes.description: Access modes for static content PVC

storageClass.description: Storage class for static content (uses global.storageClass if empty)

existingSecret.description: Use existing secret for superuser password (key: superuser-password)

enabled.description: Enable Horizontal Pod Autoscaler for uWSGI
Enable Pod Disruption Budget for uWSGI
